content.text:
*long silence*

That I'm relieved. 

*very quiet*

She was... it was complicated. She needed a lot. For a long time. And the last two years especially were — I was doing a lot of managing. From a distance, which made it worse somehow. Always on call, always waiting for the next crisis.

And then she died and part of me just... exhaled. And I hate that. I hate that that's in there.

*pulls back a little, more clipped*

So yeah. I don't really want to sit alone in my apartment at 11pm and look at that. The wine is easier.

*beat*

I'm not an alcoholic. I want to be clear about that. It's a temporary thing. Until I figure out how to get through this.
